subcodes.first_line: O Khalil! Upon thee be My glory and My loving-kindness! Praise befitteth and is meet for the Desired One Who hath guided the people of devotion to the heights of tribulation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا خلیل علیک بهائی و عنایتی حمد مقصودیرا لایق و سزاست که بمرقاه بلا اهل ولا
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @power of prayer, @martyrs and martyrdom, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @praise and encouragement
